Super schedule joined with Time Machine ratings

Source: R/super_sked_timemachine.R
super_sked_with_timemachine 2.Rd

For a given date, retrieve the Bart Torvik super schedule and Time Machine team ratings, and return a long data.frame where each row is a single team-game. Each game appears twice (once from each team's perspective), with team and opponent pre-game ratings plus the final score.

Usage

super_sked_with_timemachine(date)

Arguments

date

Date in YYYYMMDD format (must satisfy timeMachine_ratings()).

Value

A data.frame with one row per team-game, including:

  • game_date: game date as Date

  • muid: Torvik game id

  • team, opponent: team names

  • team_pts, opp_pts: final score from each team's perspective

  • team_*: selected Time Machine metrics for the team

  • opp_*: the same metrics for the opponent

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
  # 2024-11-15 slate with Time Machine ratings
  df <- super_sked_with_timemachine(20241115)
} # }
